metadata.title: Hover Editor
metadata.description: Transform the Page Preview hover popover into a fully working editor instance

regex.source: name:"Open link under cursor in new Hover Editor"
regex.target: name:"在新的Hover Editor中打开光标下的链接"

regex.source: name:"Open current file in new Hover Editor"
regex.target: name:"在新的Hover Editor中打开当前文件"

regex.source: name:"Convert active pane to Hover Editor"
regex.target: name:"将活动窗格转换为Hover Editor"

regex.source: name:"Dock active Hover Editor to workspace"
regex.target: name:"将 Hover Editor 停靠到工作区"

regex.source:
text:`Consider adding CSS "touch-action: none" to this element
`
regex.target: text:`考虑将CSS“touch-action:none” 添加到此元素`

regex.source: text:'Consider adding CSS "box-sizing: border-box" to this resizable element'
regex.target: text:'考虑将 CSS "box-sizing: border-box" 添加到此元素'

regex.source: text:"There are no listeners set for this action"
regex.target: text:"此操作没有设置监听器"
.setName("在子标题链接上触发悬停预览")

regex.source: .setDesc("Allow hover preview to trigger when hovering over any type of rendered embed such as images or block references")
regex.target: .setDesc("允许将鼠标悬停在任何类型的渲染嵌入（例如图像或块引用）上时触发悬停预览")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use hover editor for links to subheadings, instead of the built-in preview/editor")
regex.target: .setDesc("对副标题链接使用Hover Editor，而不是内置预览/编辑器")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use hover editor for links to blocks, instead of the built-in preview/editor")
regex.target: .setDesc("对区块链接使用Hover Editor，而不是内置预览/编辑器")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use hover editor for footnotes, instead of the built-in preview/editor")
regex.target: .setDesc("为脚注使用Hover Editor，而不是内置预览/编辑器")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the hover editor as the active pane when opened")
regex.target: .setDesc("将Hover Editor设置为打开时的活动窗格")

regex.source: .setDesc("When double clicking to minimize, the window will roll down instead of rolling up")
regex.target: .setDesc("双击最小化时，窗口会向下滚动而不是向上滚动")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Show the view header by default when triggering a hover editor.
         When disabled, view headers will only show if you click the view header icon to the left of the minimize button.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`触发Hover Editor时默认显示视图标题。
         禁用时，只有点击最小化按钮左侧的视图标题图标后才会显示出视图标题。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Click and hold an image within a hover editor to temporarily maximize the popover and image to fill the entire viewport. 
        On mouse up, the hover editor will restore to its original size.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`点击并按住Hover Editor中的图片，可暂时最大化弹出窗口和图片，使其充满整个视口.        当鼠标向上移动时，Hover Editor将恢复到原来的大小.`)

regex.source: .setDesc("How long to wait before showing a Hover Editor when hovering over a link")
regex.target: .setDesc("当鼠标悬停在链接上时，显示Hover Editor需要等待多长时间")

regex.source: .setDesc("How long to wait before closing a Hover Editor once the mouse leaves")
regex.target: .setDesc("鼠标离开后要等待多长时间才能关闭 Hover Editor")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Quickly arrange popovers by dragging them to the edges of the screen. The left and right edges
regex.target: .setDesc(`将弹出窗口拖至屏幕边缘即可快速排列。

regex.source: will maximize the popover vertically. The top edge will maximize the popover to fill the entire
regex.target: 拖至屏幕左侧或右侧边缘可以使其垂直最大化，拖至顶部边缘可以使其填满整个屏幕，

regex.source: screen. Dragging the popovers away from the edges will restore the popver to its original size.
regex.target: 将弹出窗口从边缘拖离可以使其恢复到原始大小。
